3305910.name: Faceless Residence
3305910.description:
Explore an abandoned mansion filled with mysteries, dangers, and an oppressive atmosphere. In this survival and exploration game, you take on the role of a character who must uncover what happened in this place while facing terrifying creatures and solving challenging puzzles.

Key Features

  • Deep Exploration: Navigate through narrow hallways, dark rooms, and outdoor areas of the mansion, each hiding secrets and unexpected dangers.

  • Puzzles and Challenges: Solve intricate and interactive puzzles that block your progress, requiring reasoning and keen observation.

  • Tense Combat: Face bizarre and terrifying creatures using improvised tools, or choose to avoid them depending on your play style.

  • Immersive Atmosphere: Detailed graphics and carefully crafted sound design create an experience that keeps you on edge at all times.

  • Mysterious Story: Discover fragments of information about what happened in the mansion. Every clue brings you closer to the truth, but beware of what you might find.

  • Dynamic Environment: The mansion evolves over time, presenting new threats and challenges as you progress.

Are you ready to survive what lurks in the darkness?
3305910.supported_languages:
英语*, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西
*具有完全音频支持的语言
